title: Xiaomi's MiMo-V2.5-Pro Tops Open-Source Rankings in Text Arena
summary: Xiaomi's MiMo-V2.5-Pro model has secured the top spot among open-source models in the Text Arena rankings. This positions Xiaomi as the third leading AI lab globally, trailing only Anthropic and OpenAI.
body:
Xiaomi's MiMo-V2.5-Pro model has achieved significant milestones in the latest Text Arena rankings, released on April 26, 2026. The model secured the #6 position globally in the Expert category, while also claiming the #1 spot among open-source models. Additionally, Xiaomi has been ranked #3 globally by lab, trailing only Anthropic and OpenAI.

This achievement underscores Xiaomi's growing influence in the AI sector, particularly in the open-source community. The MiMo-V2.5-Pro's performance highlights the rapid advancements in AI models developed by companies outside the traditional tech giants. Xiaomi's success could inspire other firms to invest more heavily in AI research and development, potentially democratizing access to cutting-edge AI technologies.

Looking ahead, Xiaomi's ranking could spur further innovation as the company seeks to maintain its lead in the open-source space. The AI community will be watching closely to see if Xiaomi can sustain this momentum and what new breakthroughs the lab might achieve. The competition among AI labs is intensifying, and Xiaomi's performance sets a high bar for future rankings.
